meta.description: Master card definitions for LUU cooperative card game. Contains all Luu cards: 5 base friendly, 5 evolved friendly, 20 rogue (4 tiers x 5 classes). Action cards defined separately.

cards.name: Rasluu
cards.description: An aggressive predator with a pointed outer shell. Excels at exploiting wounded enemies.

trait.name: Call the Shot
trait.description: Once per sector, when it is this Rasluu's turn to act, you may choose your attack dice value instead of rolling randomly. The chosen value must be within the valid range for the current sector die.

passive.name: Predatory Strike
passive.description: +1 damage when attacking a target already hit by another friendly Luu this round.

cards.name: Lagluu
cards.description: A pack creature with connector nodes on its shell. Grows stronger and recovers faster when others of its kind are nearby.

trait.name: Damage Redistribution
trait.description: Once per wave: redistribute up to N damage counters from the lead Luu to any other Luu in your queue, in any combination. N scales by sector (S1: 5, S2: 6, S3: 7, S4: 8, S5: 9).

passive.name: Pack Bond
passive.description: At the end of each round, every friendly Luu in your queue recovers 1 HP for each Lagluu present.

cards.name: Kjeluu
cards.description: An armoured colossus with a thick double-layered shell. Absorbs punishment that would destroy other Luu.

trait.name: Impervious
trait.description: Any attack dealing 2 or less damage deals 0 instead.

cards.name: Gifluu
cards.description: A phantom creature whose shell emits poison spores. Difficult to pin down and dangerous to strike.

trait.name: Phase Shift
trait.description: When attacked, roll a d6. On a 6, evade all damage. Rolled per attacker. If evasion succeeds, Toxic Rebound does not trigger.

passive.name: Toxic Rebound
passive.description: When this Gifluu takes damage from an attack, the attacker immediately takes damage equal to ¼ of the damage dealt (rounded up).

cards.name: Bisluu
cards.description: A symbiotic creature with a standard outer shell. Amplifies the abilities of the Luu beside it.

passive.name: Bonded Boost
passive.description: All Luu immediately adjacent to Bisluu in the queue gain +1 attack, +1 defence, and +1 Luutex when they take the Gather action this turn.
passive.triggerNote: Fires at the start of each adjacent Luu turn via resolveBisluuAdjacencyBonus. Dynamic — rechecks adjacency each time. Applies to Luu entering play mid-round.

cards.name: Rasluu
cards.description: Rasluu at its apex form. Deadlier, tougher, and more precise in exploiting enemy weaknesses.

trait.name: Call the Shot
trait.description: Once per sector, when it is this Rasluu's turn to act, you may choose your attack dice value instead of rolling randomly. The chosen value must be within the valid range for the current sector.

passive.name: Apex Predator
passive.description: +2 damage when attacking a target already hit by another friendly Luu this round.

cards.name: Lagluu
cards.description: Lagluu at its most connected form. The colony moves and heals as one.

trait.name: Damage Redistribution
trait.description: Once per wave: redistribute up to N damage counters from the lead Luu to any other Luu in your queue, in any combination. N scales by sector (S1: 5, S2: 6, S3: 7, S4: 8, S5: 9).

passive.name: Pack Bond
passive.description: At the end of each round, every friendly Luu in your queue recovers 2 HP for each evolved Lagluu present.

cards.name: Kjeluu
cards.description: Kjeluu in its fortress form. Its shell now protects not just itself but those beside it.

trait.name: Impervious
trait.description: Any attack dealing 3 or less damage deals 0 instead.

passive.name: Fortress Form
passive.description: Reduce incoming damage to Kjeluu by 2, and to adjacent friendly Luu by 1.

cards.name: Gifluu
cards.description: Gifluu at peak toxicity. Its poison surges with lethal intensity on every strike.

trait.name: Phase Shift
trait.description: When attacked, roll a d6. On a 6, evade all damage. Rolled per attacker. If evasion succeeds, Venom Surge does not trigger.

passive.name: Toxic Rebound
passive.description: When this Gifluu takes damage from an attack, the attacker immediately takes damage equal to ½ of the damage dealt (rounded up).

cards.name: Bisluu
cards.description: Bisluu in deep bond with the colony. Its amplifying presence now accelerates the growth of those beside it.

passive.name: Deep Bond
passive.description: All Luu immediately adjacent to Bisluu gain +2 attack, +2 defence, +1 XP, and +1 Luutex when they take the Gather action this turn.
passive.triggerNote: Fires at the start of each adjacent Luu turn via resolveBisluuAdjacencyBonus. Dynamic — rechecks adjacency each time. Applies to Luu entering play mid-round.

cards.name: Rogue Rasluu
cards.description: A newly infected Rasluu. Aggressive but manageable in early sectors.

trait.name: Predatory Strike
trait.description: Deals +1 damage when attacking a Luu that was hit earlier this round.

cards.name: Rogue Rasluu
cards.description: Further infected. Hits harder and exploits weakness more aggressively.

trait.name: Predatory Strike
trait.description: Deals +1 damage when attacking a Luu that was hit earlier this round.

cards.name: Rogue Rasluu
cards.description: Deeply infected. Dangerous in mid-sectors — Predatory Strike hits significantly harder.

trait.name: Predatory Strike
trait.description: Deals +2 damage when attacking a Luu that was hit earlier this round.

cards.name: Rogue Rasluu
cards.description: Fully consumed by the parasite. A formidable threat in late sectors.

trait.name: Predatory Strike
trait.description: Deals +3 damage when attacking a Luu that was hit earlier this round.

cards.name: Rogue Lagluu
cards.description: A newly infected Lagluu. Weak alone but recovers quickly when others are nearby.

trait.name: Pack Recovery
trait.description: At end of each round, all rogues in this wave recover 1 HP for each Rogue Lagluu present.

cards.name: Rogue Lagluu
cards.description: Further infected. Harder to kill when it has company in the wave.

trait.name: Pack Recovery
trait.description: At end of each round, all rogues in this wave recover 1 HP for each Rogue Lagluu present.

cards.name: Rogue Lagluu
cards.description: Deeply infected. Pack Recovery heals more aggressively — kill it fast or it becomes a sustained threat.

trait.name: Pack Recovery
trait.description: At end of each round, all rogues in this wave recover 2 HP for each Rogue Lagluu of T3+ present.

cards.name: Rogue Lagluu
cards.description: Fully consumed. Sustained healing makes it extremely difficult to eliminate without focused fire.

trait.name: Pack Recovery
trait.description: At end of each round, all rogues in this wave recover 2 HP for each Rogue Lagluu of T3+ present.

cards.name: Rogue Kjeluu
cards.description: A newly infected Kjeluu. Its shell makes weak attacks useless — build attack power before engaging.

trait.name: Impervious
trait.description: Attacks of 2 or less deal 0 damage.

cards.name: Rogue Kjeluu
cards.description: Further infected. Still requires meaningful attack power to penetrate its shell.

trait.name: Impervious
trait.description: Attacks of 2 or less deal 0 damage.

cards.name: Rogue Kjeluu
cards.description: Deeply infected. Its Impervious threshold has grown — only strong attacks break through.

trait.name: Impervious
trait.description: Attacks of 3 or less deal 0 damage.

cards.name: Rogue Kjeluu
cards.description: Fully consumed. A near-impenetrable wall requiring coordinated high-damage attacks.

trait.name: Impervious
trait.description: Attacks of 4 or less deal 0 damage.

cards.name: Rogue Gifluu
cards.description: A newly infected Gifluu. Low HP but attacks that land trigger poison rebound.

trait.name: Phase Shift
trait.description: When attacked, roll a d6. On a 6, evade all damage and deal 1 rebound damage to the attacker.

cards.name: Rogue Gifluu
cards.description: Further infected. Still fragile but evasion makes it frustrating to eliminate.

trait.name: Phase Shift
trait.description: When attacked, roll a d6. On a 6, evade all damage and deal 1 rebound damage to the attacker.

cards.name: Rogue Gifluu
cards.description: Deeply infected. Rebound damage intensifies — every hit that lands costs you.

trait.name: Phase Shift
trait.description: When attacked, roll a d6. On a 6, evade all damage and deal 2 rebound damage to the attacker.

cards.name: Rogue Gifluu
cards.description: Fully consumed. Heavy rebound on evasion punishes powerful attacks severely.

trait.name: Phase Shift
trait.description: When attacked, roll a d6. On a 6, evade all damage and deal 3 rebound damage to the attacker.

cards.name: Rogue Bisluu
cards.description: A newly infected Bisluu. Unremarkable alone — its danger is the boost it gives adjacent Rogues.

trait.name: Bonded Boost
trait.description: All Rogue Luu immediately adjacent to this Bisluu gain +1 attack this round.

cards.name: Rogue Bisluu
cards.description: Further infected. Still a priority target — its boost makes the whole wave more dangerous.

trait.name: Bonded Boost
trait.description: All Rogue Luu immediately adjacent to this Bisluu gain +1 attack this round.

cards.name: Rogue Bisluu
cards.description: Deeply infected. Its boost intensifies — adjacent Rogues become significantly more threatening.

trait.name: Bonded Boost
trait.description: All Rogue Luu immediately adjacent to this Bisluu gain +2 attack this round.

cards.name: Rogue Bisluu
cards.description: Fully consumed. A T4 Bisluu next to a T4 Rasluu is among the most dangerous wave combinations.

trait.name: Bonded Boost
trait.description: All Rogue Luu immediately adjacent to this Bisluu gain +3 attack this round.
